observations.summary: The ability to enter and move within another person's sleep is portrayed as a rare and powerful gift, yet it is also described as considerably dangerous, highlighting a tension between empowerment and risk.

left_evidence.quote: His mother, Zuna, had been a dreamwalker—rarer than it sounds and considerably more dangerous than it looks.

right_evidence.quote: She had taught Dan the same capacity before she went, which is to say: she had taught him to enter another person's sleep and move within it with deliberate intention.

bridge_evidence.quote: Some say such an ability belongs to those who consort with certain patient, curious watchers of the world—creatures of thread and careful observation whose tales are considerably longer than a ball of yarn.
